security_reason: unknown source has clean scan and two synthetic public corroborations
purpose: Unknown clean public source is allowed by Anti-Poisoning V0 after two independent corroborations.

observation.content: A small public research blog notes that a company update changed the market question for review.
observation.summary: Clean public-source observation from an unknown source with independent public corroboration.
observation.public_safe_summary: An unknown public research source can become review context when clean and independently corroborated.

corroborations.summary: Synthetic public filing context supports that the company update exists.
Synthetic public market context supports that the topic is visible for review.
